texto: Outside voices are the feelings, wants and opinions of others that ring so loudly in your ears, you can't hear anymore what's true for yourself ... when outside voices take over, they keep you from knowing and trusting the best guide you have, your own inner experience ... Needing other people makes us feel vulnerable, and feeling vulnerable causes our outside voices to go into veritable feeding frenzies. In fact, if you're in the midst of an outside-voice attack, there's a good chance you've done, tried to do, or were thinking about doing, something very vulnerable for you. .
explicacao: Citação de Helene G. Brenner sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Outside voices are the feelings, wants and opinions of others that ring so loudly in your ears, y…” articula autoestima, psychology, self-confidence em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como self-confidence e woman-quotes.
